> [!CAUTION] 
> **Report Security Issues Privately!**
> **This template and report on GitHub only exist for educational purposes.**
> **Never report Security Issues publicly. Report them privately to a project maintainer.**

_Describe the security issue and where it occurs._

1. _to reproduce the issue_

_What should be the outcome when performing the steps?_

_What is the outcome when performing the steps?_

## Impact & Risk

_Describe the impact the issue has. You can provide a risk score or severity._
